    • ReleasesApi

  • Method Details

    • deployRelease

      public ReleasesApi.DeployReleaseAdapter deployRelease(String customizationHrn, Integer releaseId, Optional<String> xRequestID)
      Deploys and freezes the specified release version. In case the release is already deployed, deployment is skipped and only freeze action is applied.

      Path: /customizations/{customizationHrn}/releases/{releaseId}/deploy

      Method: POST

      Expected answers:

      code 200 : (Response when the deployment has started and release version is frozen.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 400 : ErrorResponse (Response when a particular request parameter is considered invalid or could not be parsed correctly.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 401 : AuthErrorResponse (API response in case of unauthorized access.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 403 : AuthErrorResponse (API response in case of forbidden access.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 0 : ErrorResponse (API response in case of errors.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      Parameters:
      customizationHrn - HRN identifier of the Routing customization.
      releaseId - The release number
      xRequestID - User-provided token that can be used to trace a request or a group of requests sent to the service.

    • deployRelease

      public ReleasesApi.DeployReleaseBuilder deployRelease()

    • freezeRelease

      public ReleasesApi.FreezeReleaseAdapter freezeRelease(String customizationHrn, Optional<String> xRequestID)
      Freezes the current deployed release version. Any further changes to the catalog won't take effect until the release is unfrozen. Note: After around ~1 month, the release will be automatically unfrozen and latest data version will be deployed.

      Path: /customizations/{customizationHrn}/releases/freeze

      Method: POST

      Expected answers:

      code 200 : (Response when latest release is successfully set to freeze.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 400 : ErrorResponse (Response when a particular request parameter is considered invalid or could not be parsed correctly.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 401 : AuthErrorResponse (API response in case of unauthorized access.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 403 : AuthErrorResponse (API response in case of forbidden access.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 0 : ErrorResponse (API response in case of errors.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      Parameters:
      customizationHrn - HRN identifier of the Routing customization.
      xRequestID - User-provided token that can be used to trace a request or a group of requests sent to the service.

    • freezeRelease

      public ReleasesApi.FreezeReleaseBuilder freezeRelease()

    • getReleaseLogs

      public ReleasesApi.GetReleaseLogsAdapter getReleaseLogs(String customizationHrn, Integer releaseId, Optional<String> xRequestID)
      Returns the logs for the compilation of the data version and deployment with the specified release ID of the Routing customization of type Custom deployment ssociated with the specified HRN. **Disclaimer: This functionality is currently in alpha state and may change at any time without notice. Please do not rely on this functionality yet.**

      Path: /customizations/{customizationHrn}/releases/{releaseId}/logs

      Method: GET

      Expected answers:

      code 200 : String (A successful response containing the logs in text form.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 400 : ErrorResponse (Response when a particular request parameter is considered invalid or could not be parsed correctly.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 401 : AuthErrorResponse (API response in case of unauthorized access.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 403 : AuthErrorResponse (API response in case of forbidden access.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 0 : ErrorResponse (API response in case of errors.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      Parameters:
      customizationHrn - HRN identifier of the Routing customization.
      releaseId - The release number
      xRequestID - User-provided token that can be used to trace a request or a group of requests sent to the service.

    • getReleaseLogs

      public ReleasesApi.GetReleaseLogsBuilder getReleaseLogs()

    • getReleases

      public ReleasesApi.GetReleasesAdapter getReleases(String customizationHrn, Optional<String> xRequestID)
      Returns the releases of the Routing customization of type Custom deployment associated with the specified HRN. The releases can be used to relate the deployment of the data version currently used by a given customized Routing Service to catalog versions of the input catalogs specified in the catalog bindings.

      Path: /customizations/{customizationHrn}/releases

      Method: GET

      Expected answers:

      code 200 : Releases (A successful response containing the releases of the specified Routing customization of type Custom deployment.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 400 : ErrorResponse (Response when a particular request parameter is considered invalid or could not be parsed correctly.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 401 : AuthErrorResponse (API response in case of unauthorized access.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 403 : AuthErrorResponse (API response in case of forbidden access.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 0 : ErrorResponse (API response in case of errors.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      Parameters:
      customizationHrn - HRN identifier of the Routing customization.
      xRequestID - User-provided token that can be used to trace a request or a group of requests sent to the service.

    • getReleases

      public ReleasesApi.GetReleasesBuilder getReleases()

    • unfreezeRelease

      public ReleasesApi.UnfreezeReleaseAdapter unfreezeRelease(String customizationHrn, Optional<String> xRequestID)
      Unfreezes a frozen release. Starts the deployment of latest release and resumes the automatic data updates.

      Path: /customizations/{customizationHrn}/releases/unfreeze

      Method: POST

      Expected answers:

      code 200 : (Response when unfreeze is successful.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 400 : ErrorResponse (Response when a particular request parameter is considered invalid or could not be parsed correctly.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 401 : AuthErrorResponse (API response in case of unauthorized access.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 403 : AuthErrorResponse (API response in case of forbidden access.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      code 0 : ErrorResponse (API response in case of errors.) Headers : X-Correlation-ID - X-Request-ID -

      Parameters:
      customizationHrn - HRN identifier of the Routing customization.
      xRequestID - User-provided token that can be used to trace a request or a group of requests sent to the service.

    • unfreezeRelease

      public ReleasesApi.UnfreezeReleaseBuilder unfreezeRelease()

    • withConfig

      public ReleasesApi withConfig(ApiConfiguration apiConfig)
